name: Candy Cane Reindeer
recipeInstructions:
1. Loop the pipe cleaner underneath the curved end of the candy cane. Twist until secure.
2. Spread the ends apart and shape them to form "antlers." (Twist pipe cleaners around a pencil for antlers.)
3. Attach the wiggley eyes in place.
4. Glue the red pom-pom on the tip to make the nose.
5. Tie the colored ribbon around the neck.
